narrative:
Etna Township C (precinct in Licking County) has 1,562 registered voters, with 57.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 29.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.7%, a pronounced Republican lean of 17.2 percentage points.
